text:
Miniature Dino (手乗りザウルス) (A.K.A Palmtop Dino) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game. 
__NOTOC__

Summary

Miniature Dino (手乗りザウルス): This card summons forth a miniature dinosaur, small enough to sit on the palm of your hand. This creature's ability allows for a different species of tiny dinosaur with each new generation. Rumor has it that these dinosaurs are quite valuable to the right buyer.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.050 :: 手乗りザウルス 
その名の通り、手に乗るほどの大きさの恐竜。非常に進化が早く、環境に合わせて世代ごとに姿を変えていく。
|-
![Eng]
|No.050 :: Miniature Dino 
As the name suggests, a dinosaur about the size of a hand and can fit on your palm. Its evolution is very fast, and will change its face with each new generation to suit the environment.
|}
